title: SotA Lens: Citation-network mapping for exploratory state-of-the-art reviews

creators.name: Peralta Cordeiro, Diogo
creators.affiliation: Faculty of Engineering, University of Porto

description: SotA Lens is an open-source toolkit for exploratory literature mapping through citation networks. It provides a Python command-line pipeline and static browser-based explorer for building, exporting, and inspecting citation-network datasets before formal state-of-the-art, scoping, or systematic mapping reviews are finalised.
